caption: The video features a presentation at EuroPython 2018 in Edinburgh, where a speaker is discussing the similarities between traditional machine learning models and deep learning models. The slide displayed on the screen shows two code snippets: one for a linear regression model using scikit-learn and another for a deep learning model using an LSTM (Long Short-Term Memory) network. The title of the slide, "NOT TOO DIFFERENT, EH!" suggests that the presenter is highlighting how both approaches can be used to solve similar problems, despite their different underlying mechanisms. The presenter appears to be explaining the code and the concepts behind it, emphasizing the parallels between the two methods. The event took place from July 23 to 29, 2018, and this particular session was recorded on July 26 at 14:46:30.
